docs.title: Coherent
docs.text: It shouldn't be that all roads lead to Beijing or to Washington. Latin America has to find a more stragetic way, it needs a conherent regional strategy.

docs.title: Made up of
docs.text: Our weather is made up of sun, air and water that are mixed up in all sorts of ways.

docs.title: Rustling
docs.text: Just then they heard the rustling sound of someone else coming up.

docs.title: Scoundrel
docs.text: Some scoundrel stole my wallet.

docs.title: Snuggle
docs.text: I snuggled down in my sleeping bag.

docs.title: Sobering
docs.text: His death is a sobering reminder of the dangers of mountaineering.

docs.title: Trump
docs.text:
Their offer for the house was trumped by a higher bid.

The need for blood donors trumps all other concerns.

docs.title: Chatter
docs.text: Just then he heard a squirrel chatter.

docs.title: Chime
docs.text: In the distance the church bell did chime.

docs.title: Chocolaty
docs.text: They have super chocolaty (chocolatey) marshmall.

docs.title: Come across
docs.text: What if we come across the sash but don't see it in the dark?

docs.title: Could have had i known
docs.text: I could have commanded her to knock Mohawk off his perch, had I know what he planned to do.

docs.title: Croak
docs.text: Just then he heard a frog croak.

docs.title: Dwelling
docs.text:
'Til he came to a dwelling

where he'd no trouble telling

all the rumours he'd heard had been right.

docs.title: Gaze
docs.text: At dusk they went for a walk in the bush, gazing up at the gum trees, but there was not a koala to be seen.

docs.title: Giggling gurgling
docs.text: A great, big, giggling, gurgling, friendly laugh.

docs.title: Glistening
docs.text: Powerful waves slammed against the rocks from a point about halfway down, leaving them glistening in the sunshine.

docs.title: Growl
docs.text: Just then he heard a raccoon growl.

docs.title: Hand me down
docs.text: I got fed up with having to wear my sister's hand-me-downs.

docs.title: Lad
docs.text: Well, lad, I hope you won't make the same mistakces again!

docs.title: Pull through
docs.text: How we'd helped one another through thick and thin, no matter the odds, and always pulled through somehow.

docs.title: Rumbling grumbling
docs.text: A great, big, rumbling, grumbling, noisy yawn.

docs.title: Scoop up
docs.text:
I take a deep breath as I fly through the air

Then I scoop up the fox cub and, taking great care

docs.title: Set out
docs.text: I set out again. Now that I didn't have to worry about getting cut feet, I could sprint and leap as much as I liked.

docs.title: Squawk
docs.text: Just then he heard a bird squawk.

docs.title: Squeak
docs.text: Just then he heard a beaver squeak.

docs.title: Swirling
docs.text: They painted swirling galaxies.

docs.title: That ship has sailed
docs.text: I've thought about going back to college but I feel like that ship has sailed.

docs.title: To ones hearts content
docs.text: They can swing to their heart's content.

docs.title: Waddle
docs.text: They saw lots and lots of pelicans and Topaz waddled along behind them, copying their walk.

docs.title: Wedge
docs.text: But it seemed to be wedged in a crack between two rocks.
